production_note: live dual-LLM agentic solve from sequential packets only
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet content.

exercises.justification_from_packet: raise ... from e encadena la causa en __cause__ sin perder contexto. ValueError de int se reenvuelve con mensaje accionable.
ConfigError vs DataError separan fallos de arranque y de fila. Taxonomía de excepciones del paquete S09.
try/finally cierra el recurso aunque falle; no trago la excepción en finally. Cleanup del paquete de errores.
Delimiter vacío en config debe fail-fast abortando el job. No cuarentena de una sola fila.

exercises.code:
errores = [
    "delimiter vacío en config",
    "monto no numérico en fila",
    "schema_path no existe",
    "email mal formado en fila",
    "API_TOKEN ausente",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto",
]
policy = {
    "delimiter vacío en config": "fail-fast",
    "monto no numérico en fila": "recover",
    "schema_path no existe": "fail-fast",
    "email mal formado en fila": "recover",
    "API_TOKEN ausente": "fail-fast",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto": "recover",
}
for e in errores:
    print(f"{e}: {policy[e]}")
exercises.answer:
errores = [
    "delimiter vacío en config",
    "monto no numérico en fila",
    "schema_path no existe",
    "email mal formado en fila",
    "API_TOKEN ausente",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto",
]
policy = {
    "delimiter vacío en config": "fail-fast",
    "monto no numérico en fila": "recover",
    "schema_path no existe": "fail-fast",
    "email mal formado en fila": "recover",
    "API_TOKEN ausente": "fail-fast",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto": "recover",
}
for e in errores:
    print(f"{e}: {policy[e]}")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Config/secretos → fail-fast; fila mala o timeout de record → recover. Clasificación recover vs fail-fast.
Sin bare except: ValueError a cuarentena; RuntimeError de config propaga. Handler específico del paquete.

exercises.code:
tb = 'Traceback (most recent call last):\n  File "cli.py", line 10, in main\n    run()\n  File "pipeline.py", line 4, in run\n    normalize(row)\n  File "normalize.py", line 2, in normalize\n    return row["email"]\nKeyError: \'email\'\n'
frames = []
for line in tb.splitlines():
    if line.strip().startswith('File') and ' in ' in line:
        frames.append(line.rsplit(' in ', 1)[-1].strip())
print('frame1', frames[0])
print('frame2', frames[1])
print('frame3', frames[2])
exercises.answer:
tb = 'Traceback (most recent call last):\n  File "cli.py", line 10, in main\n    run()\n  File "pipeline.py", line 4, in run\n    normalize(row)\n  File "normalize.py", line 2, in normalize\n    return row["email"]\nKeyError: \'email\'\n'
frames = []
for line in tb.splitlines():
    if line.strip().startswith('File') and ' in ' in line:
        frames.append(line.rsplit(' in ', 1)[-1].strip())
print('frame1', frames[0])
print('frame2', frames[1])
print('frame3', frames[2])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Traceback de afuera hacia adentro: main, run, normalize. Tres frames del stack sintético.
Breakpoint simulado: solo id en locals, sin volcar PII del row. DEBUG y KeyError de email.

Minimal repro: entrada más pequeña que falla (primer DNI corto). No todo el CSV de producción.
Hipótesis + vs 51; experimento con y sin prefijo país. Contrato solo dígitos conserva 51.
Regresión title vs partículas de/la; RED luego GREEN. Suite de debugging del paquete.

exercises.code:
import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("familiarity.ingest")
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
print(buf.getvalue().strip())
exercises.answer:
import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("familiarity.ingest")
log.handlers.clear()
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.propagate = False
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
print(buf.getvalue().strip())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Logger de módulo a StringIO con mensaje stage=ingest event=start. propagate=False y formatter simple.

exercises.code:
import logging, sys

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log = logging.getLogger("cli")
    log.handlers.clear()
    log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    h = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stderr)
    log.addHandler(h)
    log.propagate = False
    log.info("stage=cli event=start")
    print(f"RESULT={n + 1}")

cli_stub_good(2)
exercises.answer:
import logging, sys

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log = logging.getLogger("cli")
    log.handlers.clear()
    log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    h = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stderr)
    log.addHandler(h)
    log.propagate = False
    log.info("stage=cli event=start")
    print(f"RESULT={n + 1}")

cli_stub_good(2)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Progreso a logger/stderr; RESULT a stdout limpio. Solo datos a stdout en CLI. Según theory e iDo del paquete activo de esta sección.
mask_email c***@dominio y phone ***+últimos4 con datos sintéticos .pe. Logging seguro sin PII completa.
correlation_id se pasa cli→service→repo sin global. Mismo corr-42 en tres capas.

}

clase = {

    "timeout S3": "provider",

exercises.justification_from_packet: Taxonomía data|config|provider para fallos de fila, arranque y red. Ocho casos del paquete.
process_batch cuarentena sin id y reconcilia in=ok+quarantined. Conteos del batch.

exercises.code:
rules = [
    "POLICY: abortar si falta config crítica (schema, delimiter, paths)",
    "POLICY: abortar si quarantined/in > 0.5 en el lote",
    "POLICY: abortar si provider no responde tras retries; no abortar por 1 fila data",
]
for r in rules:
    print(r)
exercises.answer:
rules = [
    "POLICY: abortar si falta config crítica (schema, delimiter, paths)",
    "POLICY: abortar si quarantined/in > 0.5 en el lote",
    "POLICY: abortar si provider no responde tras retries; no abortar por 1 fila data",
]
for r in rules:
    print(r)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Política abort: config, umbral cuarentena, provider down. No abortar por una fila data.
Timeout/Connection reintentan; ValueError/KeyError no. Retry solo transitorios. Según theory e iDo del paquete activo de esta sección.
retry_call reintenta solo TimeoutError hasta max_attempts. flaky → done en 3 calls.

exercises.code:
import hashlib, json
record = {"source": "banco_a", "id": "C001", "version": 3, "payload": {"m": 1}}
payload_hash = hashlib.sha256(
    json.dumps(record["payload"], sort_keys=True).encode()
).hexdigest()[:12]
key = f"{record['source']}:{record['id']}:v{record['version']}:{payload_hash}"
print("idem_key=" + key)
exercises.answer:
import hashlib, json
record = {"source": "banco_a", "id": "C001", "version": 3, "payload": {"m": 1}}
payload_hash = hashlib.sha256(
    json.dumps(record["payload"], sort_keys=True).encode()
).hexdigest()[:12]
key = f"{record['source']}:{record['id']}:v{record['version']}:{payload_hash}"
print("idem_key=" + key)
exercises.justification_from_packet: idem_key source:id:version:hash para re-ingesta segura. Idempotencia del pipeline.

mask_email seguro: primer char + ***@dominio (a***@ejemplo.pe). No loguear email completo.
